description: Display the next International Space Station (ISS) pass prediction for the Pittsburgh, PA ground station in GPredict, including the rise time, maximum elevation, and set time.

natural_language.prompt: I need to find out when the International Space Station (ISS) will next be visible from Pittsburgh, PA. GPredict is already open with satellites being tracked. Please find the ISS (also known as ZARYA, NORAD ID 25544) and display its next pass prediction, showing the rise/set times and maximum elevation.
